message:
feat(mux): add live preview WebSocket for tab overview

New /ws/preview endpoint for live tab thumbnails in overview mode:

Server:
- When preview clients connect, pause regular panel streaming
- Send H.264 frames at 5fps (every 6th frame) to preview clients
- Frame format: [panel_id (u32 LE), h264_data...]
- Resume regular streaming when preview clients disconnect

Client:
- Connect preview WS when overview opens
- Route frames to panel decoders by panel_id
- Disconnect when overview closes

This enables live updating thumbnails in the tab overview while
using less resources than full streaming.
